suites.title: US-11.1: Login page — unauthenticated access redirects or shows login link

specs.title: GET /application redirects to /application/tickets (public search page)
/application/tickets page loads and shows CRM navigation
/application/tickets shows Login link when unauthenticated
/application/tickets/new returns 403 (auth-gated create form)

suites.title: US-15.1: Staff ticket dashboard — ticket list and search form

specs.title: Tickets page returns 200
Tickets page renders search form with query input
Tickets page renders advanced search panel with Category and Status facets
Tickets page lists existing tickets in search results
Status filter link for "open" exists in page or URL filter works
Submitting the search form appends query param to URL
Search with a broad keyword returns results section
Empty search returns Search Results header
Ticket detail page for ticket 1 returns 200
Ticket detail page renders case number in title/header
Ticket detail page shows status badge (open/closed)
Ticket detail page shows category heading
Ticket detail page shows History section
Non-existent ticket returns 404 error response

suites.title: US-0.1: Create a Ticket — auth-gated form at /application/tickets/new

specs.title: GET /application/tickets/new returns 403 for unauthenticated users
The tickets list page includes a nav link to "Cases"

suites.title: US-15.2: Citizen submission form — public Report a Problem link

specs.title: Navigation contains "Report a problem" external link
Report a problem link points to bloomington.in.gov/ureport
GET /application/locations returns 200 (location picker used in submission)
Locations page renders Find a location form

suites.title: US-16.2: OpenAPI specification and Swagger UI

specs.title: GET /api/openapi.json returns 200
GET /api/openapi.json response is valid OpenAPI 3.x document
OpenAPI info block has correct title for uReport
OpenAPI paths include /api/tickets
GET /api/docs/ returns 200 with Swagger UI HTML
GET /api/docs/ response contains swagger-ui element or container
Swagger UI page title is "uReport API Docs"

suites.title: US-16.1: JSON API envelope — /api/* returns structured JSON

specs.title: GET /api/openapi.json content-type is application/json
GET /api/tickets returns JSON envelope (any status — Solr may not be available)
GET /api/categories returns JSON envelope (any auth/config status)
GET /api/departments returns JSON or auth-gated response (not 404/500)

suites.title: US-1.1/1.2/1.3: Open311 GeoReport v2 endpoint availability

specs.title: US-1.1: GET /open311/services returns 200 array or skips if not deployed
US-1.1: GET /open311/services.json returns service list with required fields
US-1.2: GET /open311/requests.json returns requests array or skips if not deployed
US-1.3: GET /open311/discovery returns discovery document or skips if not deployed
PHP CRM root (/) redirects to /application/tickets
PHP CRM tickets page serves XHTML content
PHP CRM locations page returns 200
OpenAPI JSON endpoint is reachable and well-formed
Swagger UI (/api/docs/) is reachable
CRM branding — page header contains city name
